overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing movement through a desert badlands area with red rock formations. The player ascends carved stone steps, traverses a cliff edge with views of a distant futuristic city featuring a red ferris wheel, then descends to move through palm trees toward NPCs at a makeshift camp.

events.description: begin ascending weathered stone steps carved into the sandstone formation

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the ancient carved stone steps embedded in the red rock face, surrounded by towering sandstone walls

entered.detail: weathered stone steps carved directly into the red sandstone cliff face
tall reddish-orange rock walls with layered sedimentary texture casting deep shadows
tall reddish-orange rock walls forming a narrow canyon passage
dry bushes and sparse vegetation growing at the base of the rock formations
dry desert vegetation clinging to rock crevices and sandy ground

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up ancient carved stone steps through a narrow red sandstone canyon. Sparse desert vegetation clings to the rock faces as the camera climbs steadily upward through the enclosed rocky passage with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge path overlooking distant futuristic metropolis

events.description: emerging from enclosed rock passage onto open cliff edge revealing panoramic view of futuristic city
jumping or descending from cliff edge down to lower desert ground level

agents.ego_description: moving along the narrow cliff edge path while observing the distant futuristic cityscape and amusement park structures

entered.detail: large red circular amusement park structure dominating the distant skyline
tall modern skyscrapers with glass and metal facades visible in the distance
industrial construction crane near the city buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the narrow canyon onto an open cliff edge path. The red sandstone wall falls away to the right while the left side opens to a panoramic view of a distant futuristic city with a prominent red ferris wheel. The camera moves along the cliff edge before jumping down to the lower desert level.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert oasis area with scattered palm trees and makeshift settlement

events.description: palm trees become prominent as camera moves into vegetated desert area
NPC characters come into view standing near a makeshift camp

agents.ego_description: moving through the desert landscape past palm trees toward a group of NPCs gathered near a rocky outcrop

notable_agents.action: two characters standing near a makeshift shelter at the base of a large rock formation

entered.detail: tall palm trees with green fronds scattered throughout the sandy desert
tall palm trees casting shadows on the desert ground
large modern industrial structure with visible cranes and equipment
large boulder formation serving as shelter for the camp
temporary settlement with fabric canopy and supplies against the rock outcrop

segments.scene_description: After descending from the cliff, the camera moves through an open desert area dotted with palm trees. Industrial futuristic buildings rise on the left while the camera approaches a makeshift camp where NPCs stand near a rocky outcrop, transitioning from empty wilderness to a sparsely populated settlement area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that ascends from a claustrophobic sandstone canyon into a vast desert vista and finally descends toward a remote settlement. It begins with a steady climb up ancient carved stone steps, moving through a narrow red canyon where sparse vegetation clings to the towering rock faces. As the camera emerges from the enclosed passage, the scene opens onto a high cliff edge path that reveals a panoramic view of a distant futuristic city dominated by a prominent red ferris wheel. The camera then moves along this precipice before jumping down to the lower desert level, shifting the perspective from the heights to the open terrain. Finally, the movement carries the viewer through a grove of palm trees and past industrial buildings toward a makeshift camp where NPCs gather near a rocky outcrop.
